_comment: Golden projection for the smoke_nav E2E. Compared MECHANICAL-FIELDS-ONLY by run-smoke.mjs: the comparator projects both the produced result and this fixture to a stable key set (scenario_id, status, counts, step ids+status, assertion ids+status, schema_version) and deepStrictEquals them. Volatile fields (run_id, timestamps, durations, device_model/api_level, screenshot paths) are intentionally NOT represented here and are ignored by the comparator. This anchors the guide/brain seam: a guide-driven flow through the shipped mauto verbs must produce exactly these mechanical outcomes.
